title: Easy CraftTweaker
description: Gui for Craft Tweaker that allows you manage your recipes with ease.
body:
This addon allows to create or remove different recipes inside without any code by placing items as they should be in the craft and then pressing Copy recipe or Add recipe straight to the Craft Tweaker and then pressing Reload recipes.  

Take item "Recipe Manager" from "Easy Tweaker" tab and use it to open GUI.

Here is example of using Workbench gui for adding a shaped recipe for amethyst sword:
![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/75e3bf516138823dd178d748d964500a1d0519ee.png)
![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/91499bb021842544bd68f3ac5b71f227cc75f83b.png)

Here is an example of craft in Blast furnace with wanted quantity.
![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0fd9e37efc24759b2a5943ba994a354e8533b3fa.png)
![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/842c034a92639c7a2f314e9b496140e8cda7460d.png)

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e964379af4a0015e1b72fbf085bfbb539f7f7ece.png)
![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bac18c364cd89c621bc9eafccef3ddbcd7dbd740.png)

You can even use potions and remove/add their recipes.
![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ab82ca66e878fd51573472797f863bf0129f8367.png)
![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0493c9adf68f21415554bb214b06b22f7f984763.png)
